content_body: The stay at this cabin was great! Being so close to the Toccoa River was awesome and the tubing and fishing was fun. Something everyone must do when vacationing in Blue Ridge is whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River. My family and I had so much fun! The first couple of times up and down that driveway was pretty scary but you get used to it. Although we spent most of the week outside tubing, rafting, and horseback riding, we enjoyed hanging out at this beautiful cabin. We look forward to visiting Blue Ridge again.
title: Great Family Vacation with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
